about: My name is TJ Maynes and I'm a passionate, ployglot, full-stack Software Consultant and Entrepeneur. I’ve worked as an agile software developer in a range of verticals, including digital health, entertainment, and fintech. I thrive on helping build self-organizing teams, automating the hard things, and frequently deploying well-tested, high quality software. I specifically look out for full-stack projects / teams practicing test-driven development and pair programming.
Currently, I'm preparing to take the Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) test, learning GatsbyJS and Rust, and making YouTube videos.
